property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: Record Id to use in the component

property.name: encargoId
property.label: Encargo Id
property.description: Encargo Id to use in the component

property.name: isFirstScreen
property.label: Is First Screen
property.description: Indicates if this is the first screen

property.name: isLastScreen
property.label: Is Last Screen
property.description: Indicates if this is the last screen
